ggsci 5.1.0
  • Get started
  • Reference
    • Frequently Asked Questions about ggsci
  • Changelog

iTerm color palette names

Source: R/palettes-iterm.R
iterm_palettes.Rd

iTerm color palette names

Usage

iterm_palettes()

Value

Character vector of palette names.

Examples

iterm_palettes()
#>   [1] "0x96f"                          "12-bit Rainbow"                
#>   [3] "3024 Day"                       "3024 Night"                    
#>   [5] "Aardvark Blue"                  "Aardvark Ink"                  
#>   [7] "Abernathy"                      "Adventure Time"                
#>   [9] "Adventure"                      "Adwaita Dark"                  
#>  [11] "Adwaita"                        "Afterglow"                     
#>  [13] "Aizen Dark"                     "Aizen Light"                   
#>  [15] "Alabaster"                      "Alien Blood"                   
#>  [17] "Andromeda"                      "Apple Classic"                 
#>  [19] "Apple System Colors Light"      "Apple System Colors"           
#>  [21] "Arcoiris"                       "Ardoise"                       
#>  [23] "Argonaut"                       "Arthur"                        
#>  [25] "Atelier Sulphurpool"            "Atlas Ragnarok"                
#>  [27] "Atom One Dark"                  "Atom One Light"                
#>  [29] "Atom"                           "Aura Dark"                     
#>  [31] "Aura"                           "Aurora"                        
#>  [33] "Ayu Light"                      "Ayu Mirage"                    
#>  [35] "Ayu"                            "Banana Blueberry"              
#>  [37] "base16-icy"                     "Batman"                        
#>  [39] "Belafonte Day"                  "Belafonte Night"               
#>  [41] "Birds Of Paradise"              "Black Metal (Bathory)"         
#>  [43] "Black Metal (Burzum)"           "Black Metal (Dark Funeral)"    
#>  [45] "Black Metal (Gorgoroth)"        "Black Metal (Immortal)"        
#>  [47] "Black Metal (Khold)"            "Black Metal (Marduk)"          
#>  [49] "Black Metal (Mayhem)"           "Black Metal (Nile)"            
#>  [51] "Black Metal (Venom)"            "Black Metal"                   
#>  [53] "Blazer"                         "Blue Berry Pie"                
#>  [55] "Blue Dolphin"                   "Blue Matrix"                   
#>  [57] "Bluloco Dark"                   "Bluloco Light"                 
#>  [59] "Borland"                        "Box"                           
#>  [61] "branch"                         "Breadog"                       
#>  [63] "Breeze"                         "Bright Lights"                 
#>  [65] "Broadcast"                      "Brogrammer"                    
#>  [67] "Builtin Dark"                   "Builtin Light"                 
#>  [69] "Builtin Pastel Dark"            "Builtin Tango Dark"            
#>  [71] "Builtin Tango Light"            "C64"                           
#>  [73] "Calamity"                       "Carbonfox"                     
#>  [75] "Catppuccin Frappe"              "Catppuccin Latte"              
#>  [77] "Catppuccin Macchiato"           "Catppuccin Mocha"              
#>  [79] "CGA"                            "Chalk"

#>  [83] "Chester"                        "Ciapre"                        
#>  [85] "Citruszest"                     "Claude Dark"                   
#>  [87] "Claude Light"                   "Claude"                        
#>  [89] "Clear Dark"                     "Clear Light"

#>  [93] "Cobalt Next Dark"               "Cobalt Next Minimal"
